action.reasoning: Observation: e3nn works without segfault; fingerprint MLP reached MAE 0.163 test. TorchMD-Net no models available, but we can build a custom 3D model using dense matrix operations (no scatter) to utilize coordinate data and potentially achieve much better MAE (~0.03–0.06). Analysis: PCA distance-based invariant model can be implemented with standard PyTorch ops, bypassing the scatter segfault entirely. Decision: write a custom SchNet-like model using padded distance matrices and RBF edges, test on synthetic batch, then train for 5 epochs on full 3D data to validate and submit eval. This should significantly improve MAE if successful.
